ce.name: Halo: CE Anniversary
ce.desc: The mission that started it all. Fight across Installation 04.

h2.name: Halo 2
h2.desc: Play as both Master Chief and the Arbiter in a galaxy-spanning war.

h3.name: Halo 3
h3.desc: Finish the fight. The conclusion of the original trilogy.

odst.name: Halo 3: ODST
odst.desc: Survive the night in Covenant-occupied New Mombasa.

reach.name: Halo: Reach
reach.desc: The fall of Reach. Noble Team's last stand against the Covenant.

h4.name: Halo 4
h4.desc: A new enemy awakens. Chief confronts the Forerunner Didact.

mcc.name: MCC General
mcc.desc: Cross-game achievements for the Master Chief Collection as a whole.

achievements.name: Arrival
achievements.desc: Complete 'The Pillar of Autumn' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Complete the opening mission on any difficulty. Follow Keyes' orders and escape the Pillar of Autumn to Halo's surface. No combat skill needed.

achievements.name: Pillar Speed
achievements.desc: Complete 'The Pillar of Autumn' under par time.
achievements.guide: Skip all optional firefights. Push straight to the bridge. Know the layout ahead of time. Normal difficulty recommended.

achievements.name: Well Begun Is Half Done
achievements.guide: Open-world rescue mission. Find marines and reach the map room entrance. Warthog available.

achievements.name: Ring Runner
achievements.guide: Grab the Warthog immediately and push to objectives. Skip non-required marine rescues.

achievements.name: Guerilla
achievements.desc: Complete 'Truth and Reconciliation' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Board the Covenant cruiser and rescue Captain Keyes. Stealth approach or firefight both work.

achievements.name: Unsupported Garrison
achievements.desc: Complete 'Truth and Reconciliation' on Legendary solo.
achievements.guide: The sniper field at start is brutal. Use rocks for cover. Ship interior has Elite ambushes; grenades early.

achievements.name: T&R Speed
achievements.desc: Complete 'Truth and Reconciliation' under par time.
achievements.guide: The sniper gauntlet is the time sink. Rush past enemies rather than engaging. Know the ship interior layout.

achievements.name: Cartographer
achievements.desc: Complete 'The Silent Cartographer' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Beach assault and map room. Clear the beach with the Warthog then push through the facility.

achievements.name: Icy Cool
achievements.desc: Complete 'The Silent Cartographer' under par time.
achievements.guide: Warthog clears the beach fast. Interior sections run at a fixed pace; just push through without stopping.

achievements.name: Executive
achievements.desc: Complete 'Assault on the Control Room' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Massive outdoor mission with Scorpion tank. Grab the tank early and blast through Covenant.

achievements.name: Scorpion Commander
achievements.desc: Complete 'Assault on the Control Room' under par time.
achievements.guide: Scorpion through open areas, then rush the tunnel interiors. Do not stop to fight optional groups.

achievements.name: Right of Way
achievements.desc: Complete '343 Guilty Spark' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Atmospheric Flood ambush mission. Survive the swamp and reach the Forerunner structure.

achievements.name: Lemme Drive
achievements.desc: Complete '343 Guilty Spark' under par time.
achievements.guide: Flood are slow; run past most groups. Keep moving through the swamp without engaging.

achievements.name: Library Card
achievements.guide: Four floors of Flood. Stay mobile, use Sentinel Beam. Tedious but manageable on Normal.

achievements.name: Bookworm
achievements.guide: Ammo management is critical. Sentinel Beam pickups are your lifeline. Do not stop moving.

achievements.name: Library Par
achievements.guide: Extremely difficult speed run. Push through Flood constantly. Sentinel Beam is mandatory for speed.

achievements.name: Double Time
achievements.guide: Revisit familiar areas with Flood and Covenant. Good ammo supplies throughout.

achievements.name: Two Betrayals Speed
achievements.guide: Banshee available early; use it to bypass large ground engagements. Know all three pulse generator locations.

achievements.name: You're the Captain Now
achievements.guide: Short but intense mission. Heavy Flood with Combat Forms of marines. Fuel Rod Grunts are deadly.

achievements.name: Out With a Bang
achievements.guide: The iconic Warthog escape run. Set explosives and race to the Longsword.

achievements.name: The Maw Speed
achievements.guide: The Warthog run is time-critical. Know the fastest route. Avoid obstacles. Boost where possible.

achievements.name: Legendary: CE
achievements.desc: Complete the CE campaign on Legendary solo.
achievements.guide: One of the harder Legendary campaigns. The Library on Legendary is infamous. Master plasma pistol combos.

achievements.name: Believe in a Hero
achievements.desc: Complete the CE campaign on co-op Legendary.
achievements.guide: Co-op makes Legendary much more manageable. Two players can cover angles and share ammo.

achievements.name: Living Legend
achievements.desc: Complete CE on LASO (Legendary All Skulls On).
achievements.guide: LASO CE is brutal. Iron skull + all other debuffs. The Library is essentially a full restart any time you die.

achievements.name: Black Eye (CE)
achievements.desc: Find the Black Eye skull in CE Anniversary.
achievements.guide: Located in 'Assault on the Control Room.' In the ice cave system off the main path. Shields only recharge by melee.

achievements.name: Boom (CE)
achievements.desc: Find the Boom skull in CE Anniversary.
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Maw' near the first Warthog section. Increases explosion radius significantly.

achievements.name: Foreign (CE)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Truth and Reconciliation' on the ship. Enemies only drop Covenant plasma weapons.

achievements.name: Fog (CE)
achievements.guide: Located in '343 Guilty Spark.' Disables the HUD motion sensor. Very disorienting in Flood missions.

achievements.name: Famine (CE)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Library.' Dropped weapons have 50% ammo. Ammo already scarce in the Library.

achievements.name: Iron (CE)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Maw.' Solo: revert to last checkpoint on death. Co-op: full level restart on death.

achievements.name: Mythic (CE)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Keyes.' Doubles enemy health. Combined with other skulls it becomes brutal.

achievements.name: Recession (CE)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Two Betrayals.' Weapons deal less damage. Means more ammo consumed per kill.

achievements.name: Malfunction (CE)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Silent Cartographer.' HUD elements randomly go offline during combat.

achievements.name: Pinata (CE)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Halo.' Enemies drop grenades when punched. Can be exploited for grenade farming.

achievements.name: T1: Autumn
achievements.desc: Find CE Anniversary Terminal 1 in 'The Pillar of Autumn.'
achievements.guide: Near the start in the main corridor before the first major firefight. Look for the glowing panel.

achievements.name: T2: Ring
achievements.guide: In the marine rescue area inside a Forerunner structure near the first group of marines.

achievements.name: T3: Truth
achievements.desc: Find CE Anniversary Terminal 3 in 'Truth and Reconciliation.'
achievements.guide: On the Covenant cruiser past the bridge command area.

achievements.name: T4: Map
achievements.desc: Find CE Anniversary Terminal 4 in 'The Silent Cartographer.'
achievements.guide: Inside the map room facility on the lower level below the main console.

achievements.name: T5: Control
achievements.desc: Find CE Anniversary Terminal 5 in 'Assault on the Control Room.'
achievements.guide: In the Forerunner interior section, look for a side passage with a glowing panel.

achievements.name: T6: Guilty
achievements.desc: Find CE Anniversary Terminal 6 in '343 Guilty Spark.'
achievements.guide: Near the entrance to the Forerunner structure in the swamp area.

achievements.name: T7: Library
achievements.desc: Find CE Anniversary Terminal 7 in 'The Library.'
achievements.guide: On the second floor of the Library in a side alcove. Hard to miss if you search the perimeter.

achievements.name: T8: Two Betrayals
achievements.desc: Find CE Anniversary Terminal 8 in 'Two Betrayals.'
achievements.guide: In the control room area before the first pulse generator encounter.

achievements.name: T9: Keyes
achievements.guide: Near the aft section of the Truth and Reconciliation ship interior.

achievements.name: T10: Maw
achievements.desc: Find CE Anniversary Terminal 10 in 'The Maw.'
achievements.guide: Near the engine room before the Warthog escape sequence.

achievements.name: CE Scholar
achievements.desc: Find all 10 Terminals in Halo CE Anniversary.
achievements.guide: Collect all 10 terminals revealing Forerunner lore. Best done in a single playthrough with a guide.

achievements.name: Score Attack: CE
achievements.desc: Score 15,000+ points in any CE Score Attack session.
achievements.guide: Complete any CE mission in Score Attack mode. Use skull multipliers and headshots for higher scores.

achievements.name: The Heretic
achievements.guide: Intro cutscene mission as the Arbiter. Minimal gameplay, essentially automatic.

achievements.name: The Armory
achievements.guide: Brief tutorial as a marine. Suit up and follow orders. Very short.

achievements.name: Armorer
achievements.guide: Rush through the equipment check. Shortest par time mission in the game.

achievements.name: Cairo Station
achievements.guide: Defend the orbital MAC station from Covenant boarders. Elite sword fighters appear.

achievements.name: With Your Shield...
achievements.guide: Sword Elites are lethal. Never engage them head-on. Use corners and plasma grenades.

achievements.name: Cairo Rush
achievements.guide: Know the station layout. Push through encounters without stopping to finish every enemy.

achievements.name: Outskirts
achievements.guide: Ground-level urban combat in New Mombasa. Jackal snipers introduced.

achievements.name: Outskirts Speed
achievements.guide: The tunnel section can be run through quickly. Watch for jackal snipers at the exits.

achievements.name: Metropolis
achievements.guide: Warthog bridge assault and urban city fight. Scorpion tank available.

achievements.name: Metropolis Speed
achievements.guide: Use the Scorpion aggressively through the city. The Scarab encounter pace is somewhat fixed.

achievements.name: The Arbiter
achievements.guide: Play as the Arbiter. Stealth camo sections. Energy sword available.

achievements.name: The Oracle
achievements.guide: Fight the Heretic while Flood and Sentinels complicate things.

achievements.name: Delta Halo
achievements.guide: Open Halo ring with Covenant forces. Banshees and Wraiths present.

achievements.name: Delta Speed
achievements.guide: Banshee skip over the first area saves time. Push with vehicles aggressively.

achievements.name: Regret
achievements.guide: Gondola assault to reach the Prophet of Regret. Iconic water-level design.

achievements.name: Regret Speed
achievements.guide: Gondola timing is fixed; minimize combat between gondola rides. Know the layout.

achievements.name: Sacred Icon
achievements.guide: Arbiter in Library-like structure. Heavy Flood and Sentinel combat.

achievements.name: Quarantine Zone
achievements.guide: Outdoor Flood zone with tank support. Chaotic multi-faction battle.

achievements.name: Gravemind
achievements.guide: Split Chief/Arbiter sections. The encounter rooms with multiple Elites are infamous on Legendary.

achievements.name: Held the Line
achievements.guide: One of the hardest missions in any Halo. The sword Elite room requires near-perfect execution. Use pillars for cover.

achievements.name: Uprising
achievements.guide: Arbiter mission through Covenant. Energy sword available for much of it.

achievements.name: High Charity
achievements.guide: Master Chief alone in Flood-infested High Charity. Intense atmospheric mission.

achievements.name: High Charity Speed
achievements.guide: Flood constantly impede movement. Plasma pistol skips useful. Prioritize movement over kills.

achievements.name: The Great Journey
achievements.desc: Complete 'The Great Journey' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Final mission. Banshee combat and the climactic battle with Tartarus.

achievements.name: The Return
achievements.desc: Complete the H2 campaign on Legendary solo.
achievements.guide: Gravemind is the main difficulty spike. Beam Rifle on Elites; plasma pistol combos otherwise. Very satisfying.

achievements.name: H2 Coop Legendary
achievements.desc: Complete the H2 campaign on co-op Legendary.
achievements.guide: Gravemind is still hard but having two players rotate cover dramatically helps.

achievements.name: H2 LASO
achievements.guide: Widely regarded as the hardest LASO in MCC. Gravemind LASO is near-impossible without co-op routing tricks.

achievements.name: Anger Skull
achievements.desc: Find the Anger skull in Halo 2.
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Great Journey.' Enemies fire faster. Hidden near the end of the mission above a doorway.

achievements.name: Black Eye Skull (H2)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Gravemind.' Shields only recharge by meleeing enemies. Very punishing in Legendary.

achievements.name: Blind Skull (H2)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Armory.' HUD and flashlight disabled. Found at the very start of the game.

achievements.name: Catch Skull (H2)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Delta Halo.' Enemies throw far more grenades. Constant grenade rain with this active.

achievements.name: Envy Skull
achievements.guide: Located in 'Delta Halo.' Chief gets active camo instead of flashlight. Great for stealth runs.

achievements.name: Famine Skull (H2)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Oracle.' Dropped weapons have 50% ammo. Resource management critical.

achievements.name: Ghost Skull (H2)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Outskirts.' Enemies do not react to being shot; must be killed to stop them.

achievements.name: Grunt Birthday Party (H2)
achievements.desc: Find the Grunt Birthday Party skull.
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Arbiter.' Headshot Grunts for confetti explosions. Easiest H2 skull to find.

achievements.name: Iron Skull (H2)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Heretic.' Co-op death = level restart. Solo death = last checkpoint. Most brutal skull.

achievements.name: IWHBYD Skull (H2)
achievements.desc: Find the IWHBYD skull in Halo 2.
achievements.guide: Located in 'High Charity' but requires jumping through 7 rings in a specific order. Unlocks rare Easter egg dialogue.

achievements.name: Mythic Skull (H2)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Sacred Icon.' Enemy health doubled. Most impactful difficulty skull.

achievements.name: Recession Skull
achievements.guide: Located in 'Outskirts.' Weapons deal reduced damage. Enemies absorb far more fire.

achievements.name: Thunderstorm Skull (H2)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Metropolis.' Promotes all enemies to max rank: Ultra Elites and Spec Ops Grunts.

achievements.name: H2T1: Armory
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 1 in 'The Armory.'
achievements.guide: In the main training room before boarding the elevator to Cairo Station.

achievements.name: H2T2: Cairo
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 2 in 'Cairo Station.'
achievements.guide: In the station command center section.

achievements.name: H2T3: Outskirts
achievements.guide: In the hotel lobby off the main street path.

achievements.name: H2T4: Metropolis
achievements.guide: Below the bridge on a maintenance platform near the start.

achievements.name: H2T5: Arbiter
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 5 in 'The Arbiter.'
achievements.guide: In the Heretic base interior section before the gravity lift.

achievements.name: H2T6: Oracle
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 6 in 'The Oracle.'
achievements.guide: Past the first gondola in a side passage off the main path.

achievements.name: H2T7: Delta Halo
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 7 in 'Delta Halo.'
achievements.guide: In the underground section before the gondola ride to Regret.

achievements.name: H2T8: Regret
achievements.guide: On the second gondola platform behind a pillar.

achievements.name: H2T9: Sacred Icon
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 9 in 'Sacred Icon.'
achievements.guide: In the lower Flood containment zone section.

achievements.name: H2T10: Quarantine
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 10 in 'Quarantine Zone.'
achievements.guide: Near the crashed Pelican at the start of the outdoor zone.

achievements.name: H2T11: Gravemind
achievements.guide: In the holding cell area near where the Chief is first transported.

achievements.name: H2T12: Uprising
achievements.guide: In a cave section before the final Covenant encounter.

achievements.name: H2T13: High Charity
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 13 in 'High Charity.'
achievements.guide: In the first Flood corridor; check side alcoves.

achievements.name: H2T14: Great Journey
achievements.desc: Find H2 Anniversary Terminal 14 in 'The Great Journey.'
achievements.guide: Near the final Tartarus encounter platform.

achievements.name: H2 Scholar
achievements.desc: Find all 14 Terminals in Halo 2 Anniversary.
achievements.guide: Collect all H2A terminals revealing the Forerunner-Flood war history. Use a guide for efficiency.

achievements.name: Double Kill (H2)
achievements.desc: Get a Double Kill in H2 multiplayer.
achievements.guide: Kill 2 enemies within seconds in any multiplayer mode. Easy in Team Slayer.

achievements.name: Killjoy (H2)
achievements.desc: End a killing spree in H2 multiplayer.
achievements.guide: Kill any player on a killing spree. Happens naturally through normal play.

achievements.name: H2 Win
achievements.desc: Win a game of H2 multiplayer matchmaking.
achievements.guide: Win any H2 matchmaking game. Team games have better odds.

achievements.name: H2 Slayer
achievements.desc: Get 50 kills in H2 multiplayer matchmaking.
achievements.guide: Cumulative kills across all H2 multiplayer games. Will unlock naturally through play.

achievements.name: Sierra 117
achievements.guide: Dense jungle mission. Rescue marines and reach the evac point. Stealth optional.

achievements.name: Sierra Speed
achievements.guide: Memorize marine locations to rescue them efficiently. Skip enemy engagements where possible.

achievements.name: Crow's Nest
achievements.guide: Defend and evacuate the UNSC base. Multi-area mission with varied combat.

achievements.name: Nest Speed
achievements.guide: Know the base layout. Use the shorter routes. Flood wave near the exit is the main delay.

achievements.name: Tsavo Highway
achievements.guide: Open highway mission with Covenant forces. First Warthog driving section in H3.

achievements.name: Highway Speed
achievements.guide: Warthog speed is key. Skip optional Wraith engagements entirely.

achievements.name: The Storm
achievements.guide: Urban assault with Scorpion tank support. Anti-air Wraiths and a Scarab.

achievements.name: Storm Speed
achievements.guide: Use Scorpion aggressively. The Scarab fight is largely scripted so push through it quickly.

achievements.name: Floodgate
achievements.guide: Atmospheric Flood outbreak in a city. Intense close-quarters combat.

achievements.name: Floodgate Speed
achievements.guide: Push through the city. Flood are slow; run past most rather than killing them.

achievements.name: The Ark
achievements.guide: Desert installation with Scorpion. One of the longer H3 missions. Spectacular finale.

achievements.name: Ark Speed
achievements.guide: Very long level. Prioritize vehicles. The Scarab fight and indoor sequences are the bottlenecks.

achievements.name: The Covenant
achievements.guide: Three towers assault and the betrayal. Banshees available. Incredible setpiece moments.

achievements.name: Covenant Legendary
achievements.guide: Brute tower interiors are brutal. Plasma pistol + BR combos are mandatory. Sticky grenades on Chieftains.

achievements.name: Cortana
achievements.guide: Flood-infested High Charity. Confusing layout and relentless enemies.

achievements.name: Cortana Legendary
achievements.guide: Arguably the hardest H3 mission. Flood Pure Forms are extremely dangerous. Sentinel Beam essential.

achievements.name: Halo
achievements.guide: Iconic Warthog escape run. Drive to extraction before the ring explodes.

achievements.name: Halo Speed
achievements.guide: Drive the direct path and avoid obstacles. Deaths during the escape reset you back significantly.

achievements.name: Legendary: H3
achievements.desc: Complete the H3 campaign on Legendary solo.
achievements.guide: Challenging but fair. Brutes need plasma pistol + headshot. Cortana is the major spike.

achievements.name: H3 Co-op Legendary
achievements.desc: Complete H3 campaign on co-op Legendary.
achievements.guide: Co-op significantly reduces difficulty. Partners can cover different sides of encounters.

achievements.name: H3 LASO
achievements.guide: All skulls on Legendary. Blind skull removes HUD. Iron skull means level restart. Cortana LASO is nightmarish.

achievements.name: Annual
achievements.desc: Complete the last H3 mission in 4-player co-op Legendary with Iron skull, all players in Ghosts.
achievements.guide: All four players must finish the Warthog run in Ghosts (not Warthogs). Extremely difficult coordination required.

achievements.name: Blind (H3)
achievements.desc: Find the Blind skull in Halo 3.
achievements.guide: Located in 'Crow's Nest.' HUD completely disabled. Hidden above a fan duct in the base.

achievements.name: Catch (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Storm.' Enemies throw more grenades. On a ledge near the AA gun area.

achievements.name: Cowbell
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Ark.' Explosion force multiplied. In the underground section near the skull platform.

achievements.name: Famine (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Ark.' Dropped weapons have half ammo. Found in the same tunnel region as Cowbell.

achievements.name: Fog (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Floodgate.' Disables motion tracker. Hidden in a specific Flood-infested building.

achievements.name: Foreign (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Covenant.' Only Covenant/Forerunner weapons drop. In the third tower.

achievements.name: Ghost (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Halo' final mission. Enemies do not react to non-lethal fire.

achievements.name: IWHBYD (H3)
achievements.desc: Find the IWHBYD skull in Halo 3.
achievements.guide: Located in 'Halo' final mission. Jump through 7 glowing rings in a specific order under the bridge. Rare dialogue unlock.

achievements.name: Iron (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Sierra 117.' Co-op death restarts level. Most brutal skull for LASO.

achievements.name: Loud Mouth
achievements.guide: Located in 'Tsavo Highway.' Explosions are louder — cosmetic only.

achievements.name: Mythic (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Halo' final mission. Enemy health doubled. Most impactful skull for difficulty.

achievements.name: Thunderstorm (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Covenant.' All enemies promoted to maximum rank. Ultra Brutes everywhere.

achievements.name: Tough Luck (H3)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Tsavo Highway.' Enemies dodge grenades and Grunts suicide-charge more.

achievements.name: H3T1: Sierra 117
achievements.guide: In the first marine rescue area inside a structure on the right side of the path.

achievements.name: H3T2: Crow's Nest
achievements.guide: In the operations center before the final evacuation corridor.

achievements.name: H3T3: The Ark
achievements.guide: In the underground section near the first Scarab encounter.

achievements.name: H3T4: The Covenant
achievements.guide: In the third tower interior on the lower control level.

achievements.name: H3T5: Cortana
achievements.guide: In the central High Charity chamber before the final push. Easy to miss.

achievements.name: H3T6: Halo
achievements.guide: In the Forerunner structure section before the Warthog escape.

achievements.name: H3 Scholar
achievements.guide: Terminals show 343 Guilty Spark's perspective on the Human-Forerunner war. Lore-rich content.

achievements.name: Mongoose Mowdown
achievements.desc: Splatter an opponent with a Mongoose in matchmaking.
achievements.guide: Requires a Mongoose spawn (Sandtrap, Sandbox) and a slow opponent. Boost into them from a hill.

achievements.name: Killing Frenzy (H3)
achievements.desc: Get a Killing Frenzy (10 kills without dying) in multiplayer.
achievements.guide: 10 consecutive kills. Use power weapons. SWAT playlist is ideal since everyone dies in one shot.

achievements.name: Fear the Pink Mist
achievements.desc: Kill 5 players with the Needler in multiplayer matchmaking.
achievements.guide: Needler supercombine one-shots most players. Try Team Slayer on small maps like Guardian.

achievements.name: Triple Kill (H3)
achievements.desc: Earn a Triple Kill in multiplayer matchmaking.
achievements.guide: Kill 3 enemies in rapid succession. Grenades and power weapons help.

achievements.name: Step Aside
achievements.guide: Hold melee behind an enemy. High ground and sneaking behind opponents helps.

achievements.name: Vidmaster: Brainpan
achievements.desc: Find all skulls on H3 multiplayer maps.
achievements.guide: Hidden skulls on several multiplayer maps including Orbital and Longshore.

achievements.name: Vidmaster: Annual
achievements.desc: Complete last H3 mission in 4-player co-op Legendary with Iron + everyone in Ghosts.
achievements.guide: All players must be in Ghosts at the final cutscene trigger. Requires perfect co-op coordination.

achievements.name: Tayari Plaza
achievements.guide: First ODST mission. Rescue Buck in the city. Short and straightforward introduction.

achievements.name: Uplift Reserve
achievements.guide: Open park area with Warthog and Mongoose. Vehicle-heavy mission with Covenant forces.

achievements.name: Kizingo Blvd.
achievements.guide: Scorpion tank through the boulevard. Fun and relatively forgiving mission.

achievements.name: ONI Alpha Site
achievements.desc: Complete 'ONI Alpha Site' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Defend and demolish the ONI building. Turrets and explosives available.

achievements.name: NMPD HQ
achievements.guide: Rooftop defense and escape as Buck. Sniper sections.

achievements.name: Kikowani Station
achievements.guide: Banshee combat through the underground transit tunnels. Unique aerial section.

achievements.name: Data Hive
achievements.guide: Underground Covenant complex. Drones are extremely dangerous in enclosed spaces.

achievements.name: Coastal Highway
achievements.guide: The Warthog escape through New Mombasa. High-octane finale mission.

achievements.name: Mombasa Streets
achievements.desc: Fully complete the 'Mombasa Streets' hub world.
achievements.guide: Navigate nighttime New Mombasa hub, activate all beacons, and find the Superintendent data.

achievements.name: ODST Legendary
achievements.desc: Complete the ODST campaign on Legendary solo.
achievements.guide: ODST has weaker shields than MC. Plasma Pistol + Silenced SMG is the standard loadout. Cover is everything.

achievements.name: ODST Co-op Legendary
achievements.desc: Complete ODST campaign on co-op Legendary.
achievements.guide: Two ODSTs spread the fire effectively. Legendary co-op is dramatically more manageable.

achievements.name: ODST LASO
achievements.guide: ODST LASO is brutal. Weak shields plus all skull debuffs make survival very difficult.

achievements.name: Audio File
achievements.desc: Find your first Audio Log in Mombasa Streets.
achievements.guide: Audio logs are scattered throughout the Mombasa Streets hub. Listen for the chime sound.

achievements.name: Sadie: Part 1
achievements.desc: Find 10 Audio Logs in Mombasa Streets.
achievements.guide: Search alleyways, rooftops, and near Superintendent terminals. Use a guide map for efficiency.

achievements.name: Sadie: Part 2
achievements.desc: Find 20 Audio Logs in Mombasa Streets.
achievements.guide: Continue searching the full hub world. Logs are in all districts of New Mombasa.

achievements.name: Sadie's Story
achievements.desc: Find all 29 Audio Logs in Mombasa Streets.
achievements.guide: All 29 logs tell the complete story of Sadie Endesha during the invasion. Best done with a guide map.

achievements.name: Firefight Initiate
achievements.desc: Complete a round of Firefight on any ODST map.
achievements.guide: Start a solo Firefight session and survive one full round of enemy waves.

achievements.name: Firefight Veteran
achievements.desc: Complete 3 rounds of Firefight on any map.
achievements.guide: Each round escalates in difficulty. Use cover and conserve ammo for the later waves.

achievements.name: Score Attack (ODST)
achievements.desc: Complete a Score Attack session with 150,000+ points.
achievements.guide: Score Attack solo variant. Use headshots and Plasma Pistol combos for high multipliers.

achievements.name: Uplift Reserve FF
achievements.desc: Survive a full Firefight session on Uplift Reserve.
achievements.guide: Open map with vehicles. Use the Warthog and turret positions to manage waves.

achievements.name: Crater FF
achievements.desc: Survive a full Firefight session on Crater (Night).
achievements.guide: Night version of Crater. Plasma Pistol for shields then headshots with pistol.

achievements.name: Rally Point FF
achievements.desc: Survive a full Firefight session on Rally Point.
achievements.guide: Urban map. Control the high ground positions and rotate to avoid being surrounded.

achievements.name: Lost Platoon FF
achievements.desc: Survive a full Firefight session on Lost Platoon.
achievements.guide: Wide open map. Use Mongoose to maintain mobility and avoid static positions.

achievements.name: Last Man Standing (ODST)
achievements.desc: Be the last surviving player in a co-op Firefight session.
achievements.guide: In co-op Firefight, survive while all teammates go down. Requires some co-op luck.

achievements.name: Noble Actual
achievements.guide: Intro cinematic mission. Walk through, watch the cutscene, done.

achievements.name: Winter Contingency
achievements.guide: First combat mission. Rescue farming colonists and discover the Covenant attack. Phantom chase at end.

achievements.name: WC Speed
achievements.guide: Rush the civilian areas. The final Phantom sequence is largely scripted.

achievements.name: ONI: Sword Base
achievements.desc: Complete 'ONI: Sword Base' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Defend the ONI base from Covenant. Vehicle turret sections and open courtyard combat.

achievements.name: Nightfall
achievements.guide: Night stealth mission with Jun. Can ghost through most encounters.

achievements.name: Nightfall Speed
achievements.guide: Sprint through the level mostly avoiding combat. Jun will follow. Fastest par time in Reach.

achievements.name: Tip of the Spear
achievements.desc: Complete 'Tip of the Spear' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Large combined arms battle. Vehicles, air support, and infantry all present.

achievements.name: Long Night of Solace
achievements.desc: Complete 'Long Night of Solace' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Space combat in a Sabre fighter. Unique zero-gravity dogfight gameplay.

achievements.name: Exodus
achievements.guide: Evacuate civilians from New Alexandria. Jet pack sections allow vertical movement.

achievements.name: New Alexandria
achievements.guide: Falcon helicopter mission through the city. Find and disable Covenant jammers.

achievements.name: The Package
achievements.guide: Defend Halsey's lab. One of the longer and more difficult Reach missions. Wraith spam.

achievements.name: Package Speed
achievements.guide: Aggressive push required. Use vehicle spawns to handle Wraiths quickly. Indoor sections are fixed-paced.

achievements.name: Pillar of Autumn (Reach)
achievements.desc: Complete 'The Pillar of Autumn' on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: Load the Autumn for departure from Reach. Final large-scale battle.

achievements.name: Lone Wolf
achievements.guide: Solo final stand as Noble Six. Survive as long as possible. Mission ends regardless.

achievements.name: Monument to All Your Sins
achievements.desc: Complete the Reach campaign solo on Legendary.
achievements.guide: One of the hardest Legendary completions. The Package and Long Night of Solace are the major spikes.

achievements.name: Reach Co-op Legendary
achievements.desc: Complete Reach campaign on co-op Legendary.
achievements.guide: Co-op helps significantly. Nightfall can be mostly walked through. The Package is still brutal.

achievements.name: Reach LASO
achievements.guide: LASO Reach is among the hardest in MCC. The Package LASO is especially punishing.

achievements.name: Blind (Reach)
achievements.desc: Find the Blind skull in Reach.
achievements.guide: Located in 'Nightfall' on a cliff to the left of the path early in the mission.

achievements.name: Tough Luck (Reach)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Tip of the Spear' near a rock outcropping above the AA gun.

achievements.name: Catch (Reach)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Nightfall.' Enemies throw more grenades when active.

achievements.name: Cloud Skull
achievements.guide: Located in 'Tip of the Spear.' Disables the motion tracker.

achievements.name: Famine (Reach)
achievements.guide: Located in 'The Package.' Dropped weapons have 50% ammo.

achievements.name: Cowbell (Reach)
achievements.guide: Located in 'ONI: Sword Base.' Increases explosion force.

achievements.name: Iron (Reach)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Long Night of Solace' in the Sabre hangar bay.

achievements.name: Score Attack (Reach)
achievements.desc: Complete a Score Attack session on Reach.
achievements.guide: Solo Firefight with score multipliers. Good way to practice encounters.

achievements.name: Gruntpocalypse
achievements.desc: Earn a Killing Frenzy in Gruntpocalypse Firefight.
achievements.guide: All-Grunt Firefight variant. Easy kills. Stay mobile and shoot Grunts in the head.

achievements.name: Firefight (Reach)
achievements.desc: Complete a full Firefight match on Reach.
achievements.guide: Standard Firefight: three rounds with multiple sets.

achievements.name: License to Kill (Reach)
achievements.desc: Complete a Firefight session primarily with DMR kills.
achievements.guide: Use the DMR for headshots throughout a Firefight session.

achievements.name: Firefight Hero (Reach)
achievements.desc: Score 200,000 points in Firefight on Reach.
achievements.guide: Use skull multipliers and consistent headshots. Co-op for higher total kill counts.

achievements.name: You Blew It Up
achievements.desc: Kill 7 players with the Fuel Rod Gun in multiplayer.
achievements.guide: Fuel Rod Gun appears on certain maps. Aim at ground level and in corridors.

achievements.name: A New Challenge (Reach)
achievements.desc: Complete your first matchmaking game on Reach.
achievements.guide: Just finish any matchmaking game, win or lose.

achievements.name: Aim to Please (Reach)
achievements.desc: Kill 25 players with headshots in Reach multiplayer.
achievements.guide: DMR and Sniper are ideal. Should unlock naturally through normal play.

achievements.name: Remember Reach
achievements.desc: Earn 77,000 Credits across your Reach career.
achievements.guide: Cumulative credit achievement. Keep playing matchmaking games consistently.

achievements.name: Reach Win
achievements.desc: Win a game of Reach multiplayer matchmaking.
achievements.guide: Win any matchmaking game. Team games give better odds.

achievements.name: Dawn
achievements.guide: Wake from cryo-sleep and escape the Forward Unto Dawn. First Forerunner encounters.

achievements.name: Requiem
achievements.guide: First exploration of a Forerunner Dyson sphere. Promethean Knights introduced.

achievements.name: Forerunner
achievements.guide: Jungle and Forerunner interior. Heavy Promethean combat. Teleporter puzzles.

achievements.name: Infinity
achievements.guide: Rescue UNSC Infinity crew. Combined Covenant and Promethean enemies.

achievements.name: Reclaimer
achievements.guide: Mammoth vehicle convoy mission across a desert plain. Heavy combat throughout.

achievements.name: Shutdown
achievements.guide: Pelican-hopping between three towers. Promethean-heavy aerial sections.

achievements.name: Composer
achievements.guide: Urban UNSC combat followed by an intense assault on a research facility.

achievements.name: Midnight
achievements.guide: Final mission. Chief vs the Didact. Cortana's sacrifice. Emotional conclusion.

achievements.name: H4 Legendary
achievements.desc: Complete the H4 campaign on Legendary solo.
achievements.guide: Promethean Knights require plasma pistol + BR/Precision weapon combos. Cover constantly.

achievements.name: H4 Co-op Legendary
achievements.desc: Complete H4 campaign on co-op Legendary.
achievements.guide: Two players sharing plasma pistol duty on Knights makes Legendary much more manageable.

achievements.name: H4 LASO
achievements.guide: Knights become near-unkillable on LASO. Precision and patience required. Shutdown is the hardest.

achievements.name: H4T1: Dawn
achievements.guide: Near the cryo-bay at the start of the mission. Look for a glowing Forerunner console.

achievements.name: H4T2: Requiem
achievements.guide: In the first major Forerunner structure. Off the main path in a side chamber.

achievements.name: H4T3: Forerunner
achievements.guide: In the jungle section before the first large interior area.

achievements.name: H4T4: Infinity
achievements.guide: Inside the Infinity ship section near the rescue area.

achievements.name: H4T5: Reclaimer
achievements.guide: Near the Mammoth vehicle at the start of the mission.

achievements.name: H4T6: Shutdown
achievements.guide: In the first tower interior section.

achievements.name: H4T7: Shutdown 2
achievements.guide: In the second tower interior.

achievements.name: H4T8: Composer
achievements.guide: Inside the research facility before the Composer room.

achievements.name: H4T9: Midnight
achievements.guide: Early in the level, in a Forerunner passage.

achievements.name: H4T10: Midnight 2
achievements.guide: Near the final sequence before the Didact fight.

achievements.name: H4 Scholar
achievements.guide: Terminals show the Didact's backstory and Librarian's plans for humanity. Great lore.

achievements.name: Black Eye (H4)
achievements.desc: Find the Black Eye skull in Halo 4.
achievements.guide: Located in 'Dawn.' Shields only recharge through melee kills.

achievements.name: Catch (H4)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Requiem.' Enemies throw more grenades.

achievements.name: Fog (H4)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Forerunner.' Disables motion sensor.

achievements.name: Famine (H4)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Infinity.' Dropped weapons have 50% ammo.

achievements.name: Mythic (H4)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Reclaimer.' Enemy health doubled.

achievements.name: Thunderstorm (H4)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Shutdown.' Promotes enemies to maximum rank.

achievements.name: Tilt Skull
achievements.guide: Located in 'Composer.' Enhances enemy resistances to their preferred damage type.

achievements.name: Tough Luck (H4)
achievements.guide: Located in 'Midnight.' Enemies dodge grenades more effectively.

achievements.name: Spartan Ops S1
achievements.desc: Complete Season 1 of Spartan Ops on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: 50 missions across 10 chapters. Co-op encouraged but solo is possible on Normal.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch1
achievements.guide: Introduction chapter. Fireteam Crimson missions on Requiem.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch2
achievements.guide: Cooperative objectives on Requiem. Retrieve artifacts.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch3
achievements.guide: Increasing difficulty with more diverse objectives.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch4
achievements.guide: Mid-season missions with story reveals about Forerunner presence.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch5
achievements.guide: Major story chapter. New enemies and map areas introduced.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch6
achievements.guide: Second half begins. Returns to previously explored Requiem areas.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch7
achievements.guide: Increasingly complex objectives with larger enemy counts.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch8
achievements.guide: Near-season finale content with significant lore reveals.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch9
achievements.guide: Second to last chapter with very intense combat scenarios.

achievements.name: Sp-Ops Ch10
achievements.guide: Season finale chapter. Intense final confrontation.

achievements.name: Regicide Win
achievements.desc: Win a game of Regicide in H4.
achievements.guide: Be the King or kill the King to win. Camp power weapon locations as King.

achievements.name: Infinity Slayer Win
achievements.desc: Win a game of Infinity Slayer.
achievements.guide: Standard H4 Team Slayer. Play objective-focused and use Ordnance drops wisely.

achievements.name: Wetwork
achievements.desc: Kill 50 players with the Assault Rifle in War Games.
achievements.guide: AR is close-range. Small maps like Haven or Adrift. Aim for the head.

achievements.name: One for All
achievements.desc: Complete any multiplayer match in MCC.
achievements.guide: Finish any MCC multiplayer match in any game or mode.

achievements.name: Back in the Day
achievements.desc: Play a Custom Game in MCC.
achievements.guide: Set up a Custom Game with any settings in any MCC game.

achievements.name: Old School
achievements.desc: Play a split-screen multiplayer game in MCC.
achievements.guide: Requires a second controller. Set up local split-screen.

achievements.name: Forging Ahead
achievements.desc: Play a Custom Game on a Forge-created map.
achievements.guide: Use Forge to create or download a map, then play on it in Custom Games.

achievements.name: Hail to the Chief
achievements.desc: Complete a Campaign mission on Legendary in each of the 7 MCC games.
achievements.guide: Pick the shortest mission per game: Pillar of Autumn (CE), Armory (H2), Tsavo (H3), etc.

achievements.name: My Collection
achievements.desc: Unlock your first piece of content in MCC.
achievements.guide: Earn any unlockable through the MCC progression system.

achievements.name: Ground Pounder
achievements.desc: Kill 1,000 enemies across MCC campaign missions.
achievements.guide: Cumulative across all games. Will unlock naturally through campaign playthroughs.

achievements.name: Demon
achievements.desc: Kill 5,000 enemies across all MCC campaign missions.
achievements.guide: Long-term grind. Flood-heavy missions (Library, Cortana) have the highest kill density.

achievements.name: Warrior Prince
achievements.guide: 10 wins across any MCC multiplayer mode. Keep playing.

achievements.name: The Man, the Legend
achievements.desc: Complete all MCC campaigns on any difficulty.
achievements.guide: All 7 campaigns completed. This is a massive undertaking — enjoy the journey.

achievements.name: LASO Daddy
achievements.desc: Complete LASO for any two games in MCC.
achievements.guide: Two LASO completions required. CE and H3 are generally most documented.

achievements.name: Speed Freak
achievements.desc: Earn a par time on one mission per game in MCC.
achievements.guide: Focus on shortest missions: Pillar of Autumn (CE), Armory (H2), Noble Actual (Reach), Dawn (H4).

achievements.name: Skull Collector
achievements.desc: Find 50 skulls across all MCC games.
achievements.guide: 65+ total skulls across all games. H3 skulls are most accessible to find.

achievements.name: All-Knowing
achievements.desc: Find all terminals across all MCC games.
achievements.guide: Terminals exist in CE, H2, H3, and H4 Anniversary. Total ~45 terminals.

achievements.name: MCC Vet
achievements.guide: 100 games across any multiplayer mode. Consistent play will unlock this.

achievements.name: Teamwork
achievements.guide: Play online or split-screen and complete 10 missions total across all games.

achievements.name: Friends in High Places
achievements.desc: Complete a full game campaign in co-op.
achievements.guide: Complete any single full campaign with at least one other player in co-op.

achievements.name: Completing the Circuit
achievements.desc: Complete all game campaigns on Normal or higher.
achievements.guide: Finish all 7 campaigns on Normal. Good baseline before tackling Legendary.

achievements.name: Double Tap
achievements.desc: Get 2 headshots in a row in any MCC game.
achievements.guide: Use Sniper Rifle or BR. Easy in campaign on Normal difficulty.

achievements.name: Pacifist
achievements.desc: Complete a campaign mission without firing a weapon.
achievements.guide: ODST missions near the hub or Cortana with careful routing. Zero shots fired required.

achievements.name: Social Spartan
achievements.desc: Play with 10 different Xbox friends in MCC.
achievements.guide: Join sessions with friends or invite them. Cumulative across sessions.

achievements.name: Playlist Veteran
achievements.desc: Complete 20 games in any single playlist.
achievements.guide: Pick your favorite playlist and complete 20 matches.

achievements.name: Weekend Warrior
achievements.desc: Complete any 3 weekly challenges in MCC.
achievements.guide: Weekly challenges rotate. Complete 3 in any single week.

achievements.name: Iron Will
achievements.desc: Complete any LASO campaign in MCC.
achievements.guide: Finish any game's LASO. CE or H3 are most commonly recommended as starting points.

achievements.name: Complete Package
achievements.desc: 100% complete any single game in MCC.
achievements.guide: Earn all achievements for one game. ODST is probably most achievable for most players.

achievements.name: The Reclaimer Saga
achievements.desc: Complete H3, H4, and H3 ODST campaigns.
achievements.guide: The Reclaimer trilogy: complete H3, ODST, and H4 campaigns in full.

achievements.name: Audio Drama Fan
achievements.desc: Collect all audio logs and terminals across MCC.
achievements.guide: All ODST audio logs and all terminals from CE/H2/H3/H4. Story-rich content.
